# Skill Registry — printall
<!-- generated by sdd-init · 2026-05-06 -->

## Project Conventions

No project-level CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md detected.
Stack conventions defined in docker-compose.yml and astro.config.mjs.

## User Skills

| Skill | Trigger Context |
|-------|----------------|
| `branch-pr` | Creating pull requests, preparing changes for review |
| `issue-creation` | Creating GitHub issues, reporting bugs, feature requests |
| `judgment-day` | Parallel adversarial review of code or changes |
| `bitacora` | Project tracking, context persistence between sessions |
| `go-testing` | Go tests, Bubbletea TUI testing (not applicable here) |
| `skill-creator` | Creating new agent skills |
| `evaluar` | Evaluating student projects (not applicable here) |

## Compact Rules

### branch-pr
- Always link a GitHub issue before creating PR
- Use conventional commit type in PR title
- Include changes table and test plan in body

### issue-creation
- Issue-first: create issue before branching
- Include repro steps for bugs, acceptance criteria for features

### judgment-day
- Launch two independent blind judge agents in parallel
- Synthesize findings — don't just pick one opinion

### bitacora
- One `.md` per project under `bitacora/`
- Accumulate tasks, context and conversations for cross-session continuity
